home.service1_desc: From vision to reality: we orchestrate every detail of your big day, from A to Z, respecting your traditions.
home.service2_desc: Your day will unfold exactly as you dreamed it. Our team manages all logistics behind the scenes.
home.service3_desc: Access our exclusive network of vendors specialized in Afro and mixed weddings in Belgium.
home.about_title: The art of celebrating the union of your cultures
home.about_text1: Every love story is unique, and when two cultures come together, they deserve a celebration that honors both heritages with elegance and respect.
home.about_text2: At Mariage Afro, we created the first space in Belgium where event excellence meets the richness of your traditions. We select the best vendors to make your vision an unforgettable reality.
home.cta_title: Ready to live your dream wedding?
home.cta_desc: Book an appointment with our team for a free consultation. Together we will build a project worthy of your love and cultures.

about.title: Our Story
about.quote: Mariage Afro was born from a simple observation: love has no borders, but it has roots.
about.text1: Founded in 2023, our platform is the result of event professionals' passion, who wanted to offer Afro and mixed couples in Belgium a space where their cultures would be understood, valued, and celebrated with elegance.
about.text2: Organizing a mixed or traditional Afro wedding requires particular expertise. You need to navigate between different family expectations, harmonize sometimes very different customs, and above all, create an event that reflects the couple while honoring their origins.
about.vision_text1: We believe that excellence lies in the details. Every wedding we accompany is treated as a unique work of art. We have brought together the best vendors in Belgium, specialized and passionate, to offer you a premium service.
about.vision_text2: Whether you dream of an intimate traditional ceremony or a grand reception fusing two cultures, we are here to transform your vision into an exceptional reality.
about.team_member1_bio: Specialized in Afro weddings for 10 years, Amara combines tradition and modernity to create unique ceremonies.
about.team_member2_bio: Passionate about African cultures, Chloé ensures every detail reflects the couple's identity.
about.team_member3_bio: Ismaël selects and coordinates our exclusive network of vendors specialized in Afro and mixed weddings.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We are here to listen and advise you.
contact.rdv_phone_desc: Call us directly to discuss your project. Available Monday to Friday, 9am–6pm.
contact.rdv_email_desc: Send us your request in writing. We respond within 24 business hours.
contact.rdv_inperson_desc: Meet us at our Brussels offices, by appointment only, for a personalized consultation.
contact.practical_hours: We are available Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm. Free consultations by appointment.
